task_completion.description: Open and read the SSA tasking order
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of ~/Documents/ssa_tasking_order.txt.

task_completion.description: Slew the telescope to the target coordinates
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars sky map centered on the target or the Ekos Mount module showing the telescope's current coordinates at approximately RA 21h 15m (21.25) and Dec -05° 15' (-5.25).
The tracking toggle/button in the KStars toolbar or Ekos Mount module is visibly turned OFF or stopped.

task_completion.description: Configure and run the image capture sequence
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ekos Capture module showing a sequence queue with a count of at least 15, exposure of 30s, Luminance/Clear filter, and the target directory set to /home/ga/Images/SSA/geo_stare.

task_completion.description: Capture the sky view of the final field
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars 'Export Image' dialog saving a file named sky_view.png to /home/ga/Images/SSA/geo_stare, or a file manager/image viewer showing this file.
A text editor open showing the completed SSA report being saved to ~/Documents/ssa_report.txt.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the KStars/Ekos GUI to perform telescope operations
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the KStars application and Ekos modules being actively used, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent did not mock the image files using terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal commands like 'touch' or 'echo' being used to create fake .fits or .png files in the target directory.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely created the SSA report based on the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The report in the text editor should contain actual observational details, not just a direct copy-paste of the tasking order prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Coordinates: RA 21.25 hours (21h 15m), Dec -5.25 degrees (-05° 15'). Filter: Luminance/Clear (Slot 1). Exposure: 30 seconds. Minimum FITS count: 15. Sidereal tracking MUST be OFF (stare mode). Output directory for images and sky view: /home/ga/Images/SSA/geo_stare. Sky view filename: sky_view.png. Report path: /home/ga/Documents/ssa_report.txt.
